creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206327
patch to update audio/libmysofa 0.6 -> 0.7

This patch also fixes the following error in multimedia/ffmpeg build with SOFA filter enabled:

libavfilter/af_sofalizer.c:166:32: error: implicit declaration of function 'mysofa_neighborhood_init_withstepdefine' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        s->sofa.neighborhood = mysofa_neighborhood_init_withstepdefine(s->sofa.hrtf,
                               ^
